name: Fish Flavour Seasoning
description: Bring the taste of the Caribbean to your fish dishes with Mamma Gwenny's authentic Fish Flavour Seasoning. A carefully crafted blend of herbs and spices that transforms any fish into a Caribbean delight.
ingredients: Salt, garlic, onion, thyme, scotch bonnet pepper, allspice, black pepper, paprika, cumin
howToUse: Rub generously onto fish fillets or whole fish. Leave to marinate for at least 30 minutes before cooking. Works great with grilled, baked, or fried fish.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 250kJ, Fat 2g, Carbohydrates 15g, Protein 5g, Salt 35g

name: All Purpose Seasoning
description: The ultimate Caribbean all-rounder. Mamma Gwenny's All Purpose Seasoning adds authentic Caribbean flavour to any dish — from meats and vegetables to soups and stews.
ingredients: Salt, garlic, onion, thyme, paprika, black pepper, allspice, cumin, coriander, turmeric
howToUse: Use as a rub for meats, sprinkle over vegetables before roasting, or add to soups and stews for an authentic Caribbean kick.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 245kJ, Fat 2g, Carbohydrates 14g, Protein 5g, Salt 34g

name: Goat Seasoning
description: Perfect your curry goat with Mamma Gwenny's signature Goat Seasoning. This rich, aromatic blend brings the authentic taste of Caribbean curry goat straight to your kitchen.
ingredients: Salt, garlic, onion, curry powder, thyme, scotch bonnet pepper, allspice, black pepper, ginger, cumin
howToUse: Rub generously into goat meat pieces. Leave to marinate overnight for best results. Brown the meat and slow cook with onions, potatoes, and water.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 260kJ, Fat 3g, Carbohydrates 16g, Protein 5g, Salt 33g

name: Lamb Seasoning
description: Elevate your lamb dishes with a Caribbean twist. Mamma Gwenny's Lamb Seasoning is a warm, flavourful blend that pairs perfectly with roasted, grilled, or stewed lamb.
ingredients: Salt, garlic, onion, rosemary, thyme, allspice, black pepper, cumin, paprika, ginger
howToUse: Rub into lamb chops, leg, or shoulder. Marinate for at least 1 hour. Ideal for roasting, grilling, or slow cooking.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 255kJ, Fat 2g, Carbohydrates 15g, Protein 5g, Salt 34g

name: Beef Seasoning
description: Give your beef dishes bold Caribbean character. Mamma Gwenny's Beef Seasoning is a robust blend designed to bring out the best in steaks, stews, and roasts.
ingredients: Salt, garlic, onion, black pepper, thyme, allspice, paprika, cumin, browning
howToUse: Season beef generously and marinate for at least 1 hour. Perfect for stews, pot roasts, grilled steaks, and mince dishes.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 248kJ, Fat 2g, Carbohydrates 14g, Protein 6g, Salt 34g

name: Chicken Seasoning
description: The secret to perfect Caribbean chicken. Mamma Gwenny's Chicken Seasoning delivers vibrant, authentic flavour whether you're roasting a whole bird or grilling wings.
ingredients: Salt, garlic, onion, thyme, paprika, allspice, black pepper, scotch bonnet pepper, turmeric
howToUse: Rub under the skin and over the surface of chicken pieces. Marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight. Roast, grill, fry, or barbecue.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 242kJ, Fat 2g, Carbohydrates 14g, Protein 5g, Salt 35g

name: Vegetarian Seasoning
description: Caribbean flavour without the meat. Mamma Gwenny's Vegetarian Seasoning brings authentic island taste to vegetables, pulses, rice dishes, and more.
ingredients: Garlic, onion, thyme, paprika, cumin, coriander, turmeric, allspice, black pepper, parsley
howToUse: Add to vegetable stews, rice and peas, roasted vegetables, or bean dishes. Stir through during cooking for best flavour.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 235kJ, Fat 2g, Carbohydrates 13g, Protein 4g, Salt 30g

name: Jerk Seasoning
description: The king of Caribbean spice. Mamma Gwenny's Jerk Seasoning brings authentic Jamaican jerk flavour with the perfect balance of heat, sweetness, and aromatic spices.
ingredients: Allspice, scotch bonnet pepper, thyme, garlic, onion, ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg, black pepper, brown sugar, salt
howToUse: Rub generously onto chicken, pork, or fish. Marinate overnight for the most authentic flavour. Best cooked on a barbecue or grill, but oven works too.
nutritionalInfo: Per 100g: Energy 270kJ, Fat 3g, Carbohydrates 18g, Protein 4g, Salt 28g
